debug_info.goal:
tab : Table
tab_valid : tab.Valid
row : Row
row_valid : Valid tab row
y : ValidSplit tab row
⊢ ¬∃ q ∈ row.toPoseInterval, RupertPose q nopert.hull

failed_attempts:
intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    have h1 : q ∈ (row.toPolytope : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
      simp [row.toPoseInterval] at hq ⊢
      tauto
    have h2 : q ∉ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
      apply row_valid
      exact h1
    have h3 : q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
      simpa using hr
    contradiction
  | .asSolution s =>
    simp [s] at *
    <;> try { tauto }
    <;> try { aesop }
    <;> try { contradiction }

-- We have y : ValidSplit tab row
    -- We need to show ¬ ∃ q ∈ row.toPoseInterval, RupertPose q
    -- Let's assume such a q exists and derive a contradiction
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq_mem, hq_rupert⟩
    -- Now we have q ∈ row.toPoseInterval and RupertPose q
    -- From y, we know that row is valid, which means all points in its interval
    -- satisfy the constraints of the problem (including noperthedron)
    -- So q must satisfy the constraints
    have hq_satisfies := y.satisfies q hq_mem
    -- RupertPose q means q violates the constraints
    -- This is a contradiction
    exfalso
    -- We need to show that hq_rupert contradicts hq_satisfies
    -- This requires unfolding the definitions
    -- Let's assume we can derive the contradiction
    tauto
  | _ => 
    -- If there are other cases, we need to handle them as well
    -- For this problem, we only have one case (asSplit)
    -- So this is a placeholder
    exfalso
    tauto

intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq1, hq2⟩
    have h1 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq1
    have h2 : RupertPose q Nopert.hull := hq2
    have h3 : q ∈ (row.toPoseInterval : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
      simpa using h1
    have h4 : q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
      simpa using h2
    have h5 : ¬ (q ∈ (row.toPoseInterval : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) ∧ q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3)))) := by
      have h6 : row.toPoseInterval ∩ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) = ∅ := by
        apply row.toPoseInterval_disjoint_Nopert_hull
      have h7 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval ∩ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
        exact ⟨h3, h4⟩
      rw [h6] at h7
      simp at h7
    have h8 : q ∈ (row.toPoseInterval : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) ∧ q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := ⟨h3, h4⟩
    contradiction
  | .asClosed => 
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq1, hq2⟩
    have h1 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq1
    have h2 : RupertPose q Nopert.hull := hq2
    have h3 : q ∈ (row.toPoseInterval : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
      simpa using h1
    have h4 : q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
      simpa using h2
    have h5 : ¬ (q ∈ (row.toPoseInterval : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) ∧ q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3)))) := by
      have h6 : row.toPoseInterval ∩ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) = ∅ := by
        apply row.toPoseInterval_disjoint_Nopert_hull
      have h7 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval ∩ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
        exact ⟨h3, h4⟩
      rw [h6] at h7
      simp at h7
    have h8 : q ∈ (row.toPoseInterval : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) ∧ q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := ⟨h3, h4⟩
    contradiction
  | .asOther h => 
    intro h1
    rcases h1 with ⟨q, hq1, hq2⟩
    have h1 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq1
    have h2 : RupertPose q Nopert.hull := hq2
    have h3 : q ∈ (row.toPoseInterval : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
      simpa using h1
    have h4 : q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
      simpa using h2
    have h5 : ¬ (q ∈ (row.toPoseInterval : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) ∧ q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3)))) := by
      have h6 : row.toPoseInterval ∩ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) = ∅ := by
        apply row.toPoseInterval_disjoint_Nopert_hull
      have h7 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval ∩ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := by
        exact ⟨h3, h4⟩
      rw [h6] at h7
      simp at h7
    have h8 : q ∈ (row.toPoseInterval : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) ∧ q ∈ (Nopert.hull : Set (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3))) := ⟨h3, h4⟩
    contradiction

exfalso
    have h1 : y < 0 := by 
      nlinarith [y]
    nlinarith
  | .asHull h => 
    exfalso
    nlinarith [h]

intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    have h1 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq
    have h2 := y q h1 hr
    exfalso
    exact h2
  | _ => 
    intro h
    exfalso
    exact h

intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq1, hq2⟩
    have h1 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq1
    simp [row.toPoseInterval] at h1 
    have h2 : row.minPose ≤ q := by linarith [h1.1]
    have h3 : q ≤ row.maxPose := by linarith [h1.2]
    exfalso
    have h4 : ¬ (RupertPose q = nopert.hull) := by
      have h5 : ValidSplit tab row := y
      simp [RupertPose] at *
      <;> try { 
        omega 
      }
      all_goals try { 
        tauto 
      }
    contradiction
  | .asClosed y => 
    sorry

exfalso
    simp [RupertPose] at *
    <;> tauto
  | .asOther => 
    exfalso
    simp [RupertPose] at *
    <;> tauto

intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq1, hq2⟩
    have h3 : ¬ (RupertPose q nopert.hull) := by 
      apply row.not_rupert
    contradiction
  | _ => 
    intro h
    exfalso
    tauto

intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq1, hq2⟩
    have h1 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq1
    simp [row.toPoseInterval] at h1
    have h2 : RupertPose q nopert.hull := hq2
    simp [RupertPose] at h2
    have h3 : y.1 = y.2 := by
      linarith
    have h4 : y.1 ≠ y.2 := by
      exact y.ne
    contradiction
  | .asClosed y => 
    sorry

have h1 : row.toPoseInterval = y.left.toPoseInterval ++ y.right.toPoseInterval := by
      rw [y.left.toPoseInterval_append_right_eq_self]
      rw [y.right.toPoseInterval]
      rw [List.append_assoc]
      rw [show y.left ++ y.right = row by exact y.left_append_right_eq_self]
      rw [List.toPoseInterval_append]
    rw [h1]
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq, h_rupert⟩
    have hq1 : q ∈ y.left.toPoseInterval ∨ q ∈ y.right.toPoseInterval := by
      simp [List.mem_append]
      tauto
    cases hq1 with
    | inl hq1 =>
      have h2 : ¬ RupertPose q nopert.hull := by
        apply y.left.not_rupert
        exact hq1
      contradiction
    | inr hq1 =>
      have h2 : ¬ RupertPose q nopert.hull := by
        apply y.right.not_rupert
        exact hq1
      contradiction
  | _ => 
    exfalso
    trivial

intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    have h1 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq
    have h2 : RupertPose q nopert.hull := hr
    have h3 : ¬ (RupertPose q nopert.hull) := by
      have h4 : y.1 q h1 := by
        simpa using h4
      simpa using h4
    contradiction
  | Or.inr h => 
    exfalso
    simpa using h

have h1 : Disjoint (row.toPoseInterval) (noper.hull) := by
      apply y.disjoints
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq1, hq2⟩
    have h2 : q ∈ noper.hull := by
      simpa using hq2
    have h3 : q ∉ noper.hull := by
      apply h1
      exact hq1
    contradiction
  | .asSingle y =>
    have h1 : Disjoint (row.toPoseInterval) (noper.hull) := by
      apply y.disjoints
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq1, hq2⟩
    have h2 : q ∈ noper.hull := by
      simpa using hq2
    have h3 : q ∉ noper.hull := by
      apply h1
      exact hq1
    contradiction

simp [row.toPoseInterval, Finset.mem_union] at *
    <;> try { tauto }
    <;> try { aesop }
    <;> try { 
      intro h
      rcases h with ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
      have h1 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq
      simp [Finset.mem_union] at h1
      cases h1 with
      | inl h1l => 
        exfalso
        apply y.1.not_rupert
        exact h1l
      | inr h1r => 
        exfalso
        apply y.2.not_rupert
        exact h1r
    }
  | .asNonSplit y => 
    simp [row.toPoseInterval] at *
    <;> try { tauto }
    <;> try { aesop }
    <;> try { 
      intro h
      rcases h with ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
      have h1 : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq
      exfalso
      apply y.not_rupert
      exact h1
    }
